ground_truth.description: Photo in Lisbon at street level. Banners hanging over street should give away Day of the Portuguese (Dia de Portugal). Beautiful blue building in background.
ground_truth.photographer_description: Photo in Lisbon at street level. The banners hanging over the street should give away that it is the day of the Portuguese. Beautiful blue building in the background; don't know if it is a landmark. Daytime, clear skies, summer.
ground_truth.notes: Daytime, clear skies, summer. Dia de Portugal.

reverse_geocoded.formatted_address: Largo da Graça MB, 1100-266 Lisboa, Portugal

details.description: Street-level view of a lively Lisbon square decorated for the Santos Populares summer festivities. Colorful bunting in green, red, yellow and white tinsel garlands are strung overhead, with branded pennants for Sagres beer and Paladin sauces. People queue beside a temporary food/drinks stall and sit under large red Sagres umbrellas. The backdrop is a multi‑story Lisbon apartment building clad in blue‑green azulejo tiles, with white window surrounds, black wrought‑iron balconies and a terracotta roof with dormer windows—typical late 19th/early 20th‑century Lisbon architecture. Mature trees frame the scene under a clear late‑afternoon sky, giving the ambience of a neighborhood arraial (street party).

details.description: A lively Lisbon street scene during daytime with a bright blue sky. The street is strung with multiple colorful pennant banners and tinsel-like garlands, creating a festive atmosphere. In the mid-ground there is a turquoise azulejo-tiled building with white window frames and small balconies, typical of Lisbon's historic architecture. On the right, red cafe umbrellas (brand Sagres) shade outdoor seating with people dining and standing around. The foreground shows pedestrians, some with short hair, casually dressed, suggesting a busy urban neighborhood. The overall scene resembles a bustling pedestrian street in the Graça/Chiado area of Lisbon, featuring traditional tile facades, outdoor dining, and festival decorations.

details.description: A lively outdoor scene in Lisbon showing a small square decorated for a neighborhood festival. Colorful bunting and tinsel garlands stretch overhead between buildings, with brand flags and round red beer signs visible. People queue near a kiosk and sit at café tables shaded by red Sagres umbrellas. The backdrop is a classic Lisbon residential block with a blue-green azulejo-tiled facade, wrought-iron balconies, and a red tiled roof. A tree provides partial shade, and the sky is clear and bright.

details.description: A bright street scene in Lisbon featuring a festive canopy of colorful bunting and flags stretched across a narrow pedestrian avenue. The square is lined with pastel-tiled buildings and red-tiled roofs, casting a warm, sunlit atmosphere. Numerous people are visible, some seated at outdoor cafés under Sagres-branded umbrellas, while others stand or walk along the crowded street. The overall mood is lively and celebratory, with the bunting creating diagonal lines across the blue sky and drawing the eye toward the heart of the square. The setting suggests a central area in the Graça district, near popular viewpoints and cultural sites.

details.description: A vibrant, sunlit outdoor scene at a street festival in Lisbon, specifically the Arraial da Graça. The sky is a deep blue, crisscrossed by numerous strings of colorful pennant flags (bunting) in red, yellow, green, and black, bearing the logos of sponsors "SAGRES" and "PALADIN". Tinsel garlands in Portuguese national colors (red, green) also hang overhead. In the background, a large, multi-story residential building features a distinctive blue tiled (azulejo) façade, white-framed windows, and a red tiled roof with dormers. In the foreground and midground, a crowd of people mingles in an open paved space, with some seated at tables under red umbrellas branded with "SAGRES". To the left, a temporary kiosk or bar structure is visible, partially obscured by trees.

details.description: A vibrant outdoor scene in Lisbon during the Santos Populares (Popular Saints) festival. The image is taken from a low angle in a public square, looking towards a large multi-story building with a distinctive blue-tiled (azulejo) facade and a red-tiled roof. Numerous strings of colorful pennants and tinsel garlands are crisscrossed above the square. The pennants feature the logos of Portuguese brands Sagres (beer) and Paladin (food). In the foreground, people are gathered at an outdoor cafe area with red Sagres-branded umbrellas and tables. The sky is a clear, deep blue, indicating a sunny day.

details.description: A lively Lisbon street scene decorated for the June popular festivals: long strings of red, green, yellow, and white tinsel garlands and pennant bunting stretch across a narrow street. Red SAGRES beer umbrellas and branded round bunting are visible. Some triangular flags carry the PALADIN condiment brand logo. The backdrop is a typical Lisbon apartment block with a blue-green azulejo tile facade, white-trimmed windows, and a terracotta roof, consistent with Pombaline-era urban architecture. People gather under the decorations at outdoor café seating in bright afternoon sun.

details.description: A lively street festival in a European town. Overhead festive bunting and garlands stretch across the street, featuring colorful triangular pennants (red, yellow, blue, green) and red-white-green tinsel. Circular red Sagres logos appear on some pennants, hinting at Portuguese branding. In the background, a row of multi-story buildings includes a distinctive turquoise tile-clad façade with white-framed windows and a red-tiled roof. On the right, outdoor cafe seating under red umbrellas lines the street, where people mingle near barricades and market-style stalls. The scene is bright and sunny with a clear blue sky.

details.description: A lively urban street scene during a festival. The sky is clear and blue. Colorful bunting and garlands are strung diagonally across the street, with triangular pennants in red, yellow, green, and blue, and red tinsel-like decorations. Pastel-colored buildings with multiple windows line both sides of the street. Outdoor seating and red umbrellas are visible along one side, suggesting a cafe or stalls. A crowd of people stroll along the street, with some individuals seen in the foreground from behind. The overall atmosphere is festive and crowded, typical of a street celebration in a city square.

details.description: A low-angle, upward-facing shot capturing vibrant street decorations typical of the Festas de Lisboa (Lisbon Festivals) in Portugal. The deep blue sky is crisscrossed with strings of colorful tinsel garlands (red, white, green) and bunting flags. The flags feature logos for Portuguese brands: red shield-shaped flags for "Sagres" beer and triangular/swallow-tail flags for "Paladin" condiments. In the background, a multi-story building displays traditional Portuguese architecture with a façade covered in blue and white geometric azulejo tiles, featuring white-framed windows and small balconies. In the bottom right foreground, the heads and shoulders of several people are visible, suggesting a crowded outdoor street party or café terrace atmosphere. A red "Sagres" umbrella is also partially visible on the right.

details.description: A vertical-oriented photograph (rotated 90 degrees) capturing a festive street scene in Lisbon, Portugal, likely during the 'Santos Populares' (Popular Saints) celebrations in June. The sky is a deep, clear blue. Overhead, numerous strings of colorful triangular bunting in red, yellow, and green, along with fluffy tinsel garlands in red, white, and green, create a dense canopy. Some flags bear the logos of Portuguese brands 'Sagres' and 'Paladin'. In the background, a multi-story building features a classic facade of blue patterned azulejos (ceramic tiles) with white stone window surrounds and a terracotta tile roof. Below, a crowd of people is visible at an outdoor 'arraial' (street party), with red 'Sagres' branded umbrellas providing shade for patrons at tables.
